description_text: The Absolute Stand of Supreme Might and Massive Proportions From the legendary anime and manga masterpiece JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders comes the highly anticipated reissue of the golden titan— The World ! Released by Medicos Entertainment under their premium Super Action Statue series, this figure returns with refreshed packaging while preserving the flawless design elements fans love. The figure perfectly captures the character's signature heavy, imposing, and massive build, faithfully reflecting the intimidating art style of Hirohiko Araki. Hyper-Articulated Engineering for Time-Stopping Poses Don't be fooled by its bulky armor and heavy oxygen-tank back design—The World is engineered with a brilliant, wide range of articulation. This lets collectors effortlessly mimic the rapid-fire punches, dramatic mid-air floats, and theatrical gestures seen during the final showdown in Cairo. To expand your display options, the figure comes complete with an array of interchangeable hand parts and an alternative screaming faceplate to capture the sheer intensity of its legendary "MUDA MUDA MUDA" barrage. 【 Product Specifications 】 Item Height: Approx. 165 mm Material C

description_text: The Ultimate Evil Returns in a Premium Reissue Edition From the legendary anime and manga masterpiece JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Part 3: Stardust Crusaders comes a highly anticipated reissue of the ultimate antagonist— DIO ! Released by Medicos Entertainment as part of their acclaimed Super Action Statue series, this definitive figure returns with an updated packaging style. Boasting exceptional structural engineering, it balances screen-accurate muscular sculpting with hyper-flexible articulation, allowing you to recreate DIO's bizarre and iconic theatrical poses with absolute stability. Recreate the Legendary Final Showdown in Cairo This premium figure is an absolute dream for posing enthusiasts, coming loaded with a massive assortment of option parts straight from the anime's breathtaking finale. DIO includes three distinct, interchangeable head sculpts to capture his shifting moods: a sinister composed face, a devious smirking expression, and a crazed battle-ready face. Furthermore, he comes with multiple interchangeable hands, a lethal set of throwing Knives , and the memorable Road Sign pulled straight from the asphalt during his brutal street fight against Jotaro Kujo and Star

Every intricate accessory, fabric fold, and even her finely applied colorful nail polish have been tracked with absolute precision to create a satisfying, premium finish on your shelf space. description_text: Good Smile Company 1/7 Scale Figure — Black Shiro (No Game No Life) Immerse your display space in a captivating aura of mystery and tactical brilliance. From the acclaimed light novel and anime phenomenon No Game No Life comes the stunning debut of the Black Shiro 1/7 Scale Figure . Carefully adapted from the spectacular cover and interior illustrations of the series' 11th volume, this premium collectible highlights Shiro enveloped in an air of darkness, presenting a beautifully bewitching contrast to her standard look. Standing at an impressive height of approximately 256mm (25.6cm), this statue is a triumph of delicate sculpting and intricate color composition. Sculptor Yuuko-n (knead) has masterfully captured Shiro's petite structural frame in a dynamic, alluring pose, dressed in a revealing, dark-toned sailor outfit. Her legendary long, flowing hair cascades elegantly around the base, tracked with precision paintwork by Nobuhiro Yoshino to maintain perfect gradient transitions and incredible visual depth. description_text: Trinity's Beloved Princess Hits the Beach in Chibi Form From the hit tactical mobile RPG Blue Archive comes a gorgeous Nendoroid Basic edition of Mika Misono, the popular member of Trinity General School's elite student council, the Tea Party! Swapping her majestic academy uniform for a breezy, elegant swimsuit, Mika is ready to spend her summer vacation relaxing by the waves. Her distinctive soft pastel pink hair, delicate wings, and bubbly personality have been flawlessly distilled into this compact, highly poseable format. Streamlined for Accessibility: The Nendoroid Basic Concept The "Nendoroid Basic" lineup is a special series designed around the core concepts of being "affordable" and "fast." By streamlining the packaging to focus purely on the character's most essential and iconic look—omitting extra interchangeable faceplates and bulky accessory parts—Good Smile Company delivers your favorite characters quickly without compromising on premium quality. This figure retains the exact same articulation and functionality as a standard Nendoroid, meaning the limbs and neck are fully poseable, and her face is 100% interchangeable with other faceplates in your existing Nendoroid co

This premium collectible masterfully scales down her energetic wizard personality into a highly detailed, luxurious three-dimensional format. FREEing's artisan sculptors have meticulously tracked Wendy's signature aesthetic lines, beautifully preserving her dynamic flowing twintails, petite structural frame, and innocent, heartwarming facial expression. The sleek glossy finish of her custom bunny suit layout provides a striking textural contrast against her soft, vibrant hair contours. description_text: threezero DLX 1/12 Scale Figure — Iron Man Mark 44 Hulkbuster (Battle Damaged) Witness the awe-inspiring engineering of Stark Industries completely battle-tested and scarred by intense frontline warfare. From the cinematic universe of Marvel Studios' The Infinity Saga comes the official debut of the DLX Iron Man Mark 44 Hulkbuster (Battle Damaged) articulated masterpiece, crafted by the pioneers at threezero . This special edition layout brings an elite level of realism to your showcase, mapping out every scratch, scorch, and impact mark sustained during its legendary heavy-duty encounters. Standing at an imposing height of approximately 11.7 inches (about 30cm), this figure is a phenomenal milestone in 1/12 scale mecha design. Built upon threezero's signature DLX die-cast system , the interior skeleton combines premium zinc alloy and structural metal joints to provide an incredible 65 points of high-fidelity articulation . This heavy-density metal core guarantees supreme structural balance and joint longevity, enabling collectors to stage iconic three-point landing poses, defensive blocks, and ground-shaking combat stances with absolute ease. description_text: Good Smile Company MODEROID — King's Style Winzert Reissue (Mado King Granzort) Unleash the ultimate power of the Wind God with an exquisite, top-tier mechanical overhaul. From the beloved anime saga Mado King Granzort comes the highly anticipated reissue of the MODEROID King's Style Winzert plastic model kit. Masterfully sculpted by artisan designer Mr. Jeon (GOD BRAVE STUDIO) with beautiful design cooperation by mffp , this King's Style variant elevates the original iconic mecha profile by infusing it with dense, multi-layered armor plates, sharp panel-line tracking, and a premium structural presence. Standing at a commanding height of approximately 175mm (17.5cm) to the top of its head, this model kit relies on a brilliant system of multi-colored runners and varied parts layout, allowing hobbyists to achieve an incredibly striking, anime-accurate finish through simple assembly. The increased size footprint of the King's Style framework allows for the inclusion of highly advanced, newly layouted articulation joints, maximizing the model's overall stability and dynamic posing range for high-end shelf displays. description_text: The Legendary Executioner of Silent Hill Returns to the Fog From Konami's masterpiece psychological horror game SILENT HILL 2 comes a highly anticipated re-release of the franchise's ultimate symbol of guilt and punishment— Red Pyramid Thing ! Shrunk down into the signature pocket-sized Nendoroid format, this figure manages to capture the industrial, rust-covered nightmare aesthetic of the character while imbuing it with a bizarrely cute, toddling chibi posture. Iconic Weaponry and Articulated Horror Posing Despite his small stature, this Nendoroid commands an imposing presence thanks to his expertly rendered geometric headpiece and blood-stained aprons. To recreate the most memorable and harrowing encounters from the game, the figure comes equipped with his massive, heavy Great Knife , along with other optional weapon pieces like his piercing spear. description_text: The Tsukkomi of the Twin Duo Debuts in Nendoroid Form! From the world-famous VTuber agency hololive production comes a long-awaited Nendoroid of the younger, blue-accented twin sister of the dynamic duo FuwaMoco— Mococo Abyssgard ! Known for her high-pitched shrieks, hilarious internet rants, and absolute dedication to the Ruffians, Mococo's vibrant and energetic idol personality has been beautifully shrunk down into the iconic, highly poseable 100mm Nendoroid format. Expressive Faceplates Their Adorable Mascot Pero This premium figure comes packed with customizable options to recreate your favorite streaming moments and iconic twin antics. Swap between three delightful faceplates: a classic Smiling Face , a beaming, joyful Gleeful Smile , and a playful Winking Face . For optional parts, she includes her favorite sweet Donut snack, an idol Microphone for concert streams, and a miniature figure of their round, mysterious underworld pet dog mascot, Pero !
